analysis.title: Detection Analysis
collection.emptyBody: Choose a base folder, then scan it to build an overview of detected bird species.
collection.selectOccurrence: Select an image from the carousel.
collection.title: Collection
correction.searchPlaceholder: Search by French, English, scientific name, or code...
correction.startTyping: Start typing a species name to show suggestions.
detection.gpsMissingBody: Prediction may be less precise because no GPS coordinates were used.
empty.featureLocalBody: All processing happens locally on your device. No data is sent to the cloud.
empty.featureModelBody: Uses a state-of-the-art model with 96.5% classification accuracy, accelerated on GPU when available and fully supported on CPU.
empty.intro: Select an image to begin bird detection. Our local AI will analyze the visual features to provide precision identification.
location.intro: Use embedded GPS coordinates or import a GPX track before prediction.
location.title: Location Data
organization.destinationNotEmptyBody: The selected destination already contains files or folders. Existing files with the same name will be overwritten.
organization.gpxHelp: Upload a GPX track to interpolate location data based on photo timestamps.
organization.intro: Analyze a full photo folder, identify detected birds, then copy the images into folders by species.
organization.renameFiles: Add date and time to copied file names
organization.title: Automatic photo organization
version.label: Version
update.body: Version {available} is available. You are currently using {current}.
update.title: Update available
lightroom.aboutBody: The plugin connects Lightroom Classic to Aves so predictions can be applied directly in the catalog as hierarchical Aves Caesar > species keywords.
lightroom.aboutMenu: In Lightroom Classic, use Library > Plug-in Extras > Aves Caesar to tag a selection, the active folder, or the entire catalog.
lightroom.aboutSafety: Aves does not modify original files, does not create XMP sidecars, and only removes keywords managed under the Aves Caesar root.
lightroom.title: Lightroom Bridge
lightroom.upgradeBody: A newer Lightroom plugin is available. Installed version: {installed}. Available version: {available}.
settings.cacheCleared: {count} cache entry(s) and {thumbnails} collection thumbnail(s) cleared.
settings.cacheDescription: Manage app preferences and local data stored on this device.
settings.cacheHelp: Removes saved prediction results so the next analysis runs the model again.
settings.gpxToleranceHelp: Maximum time difference allowed when matching a photo timestamp to a GPX point.
settings.languageHelp: Use your system language until you choose a language here.
settings.logsHelp: Creates a ZIP archive on your desktop with every current log file.
settings.runtimeHelp: Detected execution device for local predictions.
settings.thresholdHelp: Minimum confidence required for a bird to count in collection, organization, and Lightroom results.
settings.title: Settings
status.gpsFound: GPS coordinates found in the picture.
status.gpxFirstPoint: Using first GPX point because the picture has no timestamp.
status.noGps: No GPS found. Enter coordinates or choose a GPX file.
status.selectImageBeforeGpx: Choose a picture before selecting GPX.
